- Refactor antipattern detection in isContextOrDoneParam:
  - hasContextOrDoneParamName: Checks if parameter name suggests context/cancellation
  - isContextType: Checks if parameter type is context.Context
  - isChannelType: Checks if parameter is a channel type

- Simplify duplication detection pipeline in DetectClonePairs:
  - buildDuplicateGroups: Creates deduplicated fingerprint groups
  - convertToClonePairs: Transforms fingerprints to ClonePair format
  - createCloneInstances: Builds CloneInstance records
  - sortClonePairs: Orders clone pairs by line count and hash

- Unify interface detection logic in pattern analysis:
  - isInterfaceExpr: Central interface detection method
  - isInlineInterface: Checks for inline interface type definitions
  - isNamedInterface: Checks for named interface identifiers
  - isASTResolvedInterface: Resolves identifiers to interface types
  - isQualifiedInterface: Checks for qualified selectors (pkg.Interface)

These changes improve code maintainability by reducing function complexity,
improving testability, and reducing duplication across the codebase.

commit.message:
fix: Windows installer handles system PATH precedence

Git is typically in system PATH (C:\Program Files\Git\cmd), which
takes precedence over user PATH. The installer now detects this and
requests elevation to prepend lawful-git to system PATH instead.
Falls back to user PATH if git isn't in system PATH.

commit.message:
Fix #64 enums without declared type (#77)

* Fix enum without explicit type rendering as null (issue #64)

When a schema uses 'enum' without a 'type' field (valid JSON Schema),
get_example_from_schema fell through to 'return None' because there was
no type to dispatch to a ScalarExampleHandler. The enum check in
ScalarExampleHandler.get_example was never reached.

Fix: add an early enum check in get_example_from_schema itself, after
the 'examples' check and before the type dispatch, so typeless enums
also return their first value.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update __init__.py
